name: copywriting-frameworks
description: Direct-response copywriting workflow for drafting, rewriting, critiquing, and explaining persuasive copy. Use when Claude needs to work on headlines, hooks, ads, landing pages, emails, sales pages, CTAs, founder stories, lead magnets, social or video scripts, offer pages, copy critiques, copywork, swipe-file analysis, AIDA, curiosity gaps, open loops, objection handling, proof-first ads, or story-driven sales copy. author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 一套帮 Claude 写直效文案的工作流，覆盖标题、广告、落地页、邮件、销售页等场景，适合需要打磨钩子、处理异议或拆解 swipe file 的文案工作。
